Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Summons And Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. BRIAN P. MCGURK of Michael & Associates, PC, Tel No. (805) 379-8505 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiffs;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AND AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Summons And Second Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiffs shall file their Second Amended Complaint within ten (10) days. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Paula J. Shi, CSR #13358 (302/EHG)

Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK, A UTAH STATE CHARTERED BANK'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is Off calendar. Moving party did not deliver a courtesy copy of the moving papers in violation of Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Continued To Jan-21-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lisa D. Dubowski, Esq. of Michael & Associates, Tel. 805.379.8505 ext.3022, by Court Call, and Sherrett O. Walker, Esq., Tel. 415.305.6546, both for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel did not give proper notice that the tentative ruling is contested. The matter was discussed and PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is ordered Off calendar as untimely under CCP 1005(b). The motion was filed on September 26, 2014. Moving party only provided 5 court days notice. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR# 5976
